hero.title: Northern View Savings Bank
hero.message: We at Northern View Savings Bank are proud to have been your local bank for over 80 years! Personally, I have only been the bank manager since 2021, but I still take pride in seeing our long tradition of providing excellent customer service to each and every client, as well as being a significant supporter in our local community.

services.title: Everything you need in your local bank
services.bankDesc: Our skilled customer advisors assess your needs and offer you the best deal with the best terms.
services.fundsDesc: We offer a wide range of investment funds tailored to your risk profile.
services.mortgageDesc: On average, we provide 0.5% better interest rates than the Velvet Narrows Local Bank.

community.title: We believe in giving back to the local community
community.intro: We donate 0.5% of our profits back to Northern View, because we care.
community.footballDesc: We've sponsored new football jerseys for FC Northern View.
community.theaterDesc: Northern View Savings Bank was asked to sponsor new chairs for the theater hall, but we had to decline. We did, however, purchase more than 14 new chair covers!
community.youthDesc: The youth club on Stensrupsveien has received two new guitars and new cymbals for their drum set.

about.title: About Northern View Savings Bank
about.history: Northern View Savings Bank has been your local bank for over 80 years. We are proud of our long tradition of excellent customer service and community support.
about.values: We believe in fairness, loyalty and outstanding service. On average, we provide 0.5% better interest rates than the Velvet Narrows Local Bank, and are generally considered to be friendlier and significantly better human beings (customer survey conducted by NVB, 2019).
about.communityText: We donate 0.5% of our profits back to Northern View, because we care. We sponsor local activities, from football to theater.
